text:

svn diff for www/nextcloud

Sorry for the delay.

Revised svn diff.

  - Modify directory/file permissions as per NextCloud install guide (https://docs.nextcloud.com/server/11/admin_manual/installation/installation_wizard.html#strong-perms-label)

Please check if that's all in order wrt the permissions.
